name: cpig-bool-refactor-10-phase8-mixed
description: PHASE 8 verification — a TRUE mixed-type composite that forces FieldWrapper::Kind::UNION (structured), not the libfive fast-path. Pattern: _CPigSphere → _CPigSmooth on it (Phase 1 promotes this to Kind::SMOOTH procedural composite) → _CPigSphere (libfive) → _CPigUnion (libfive ∪ procedural → Kind::UNION structured composite). The Phase 3 exporter in N_LEVELSETS_PLUS_OPTREE mode should emit 2 LevelSets (one per leaf) + the op tree sidecar; CPig.Rhino reads back the leaf count; Bridge gets fieldIds with the composite's id repeated twice; Penumbra's GLSL marcher composes per-fragment. Expected telemetry: gl.scene.loaded with atoms:2, rep showing mixed reps (e.g. "atlasBaked,tape" — one tape sphere + one dense smoothed sphere).

checkpoints.name: phase8-mixed
checkpoints.description: Union of a libfive sphere and a SMOOTH-wrapped sphere (Kind::SMOOTH procedural). The composite is mixed-type → Phase 8 N_LEVELSETS_PLUS_OPTREE → 2 atoms (tape + dense). Expected visual: a peanut-of-two-spheres where one half is crisp tape and the other slightly inflated/blurred from the smoothing.
